title: Probability, Counting, Expected Value, and Risk · Mixed Practice Return
summary: Compare warranties, games, reliability claims, and scheduling risks with transparent assumptions. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a practical risk and expected-value brief after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define outcomes and sample spaces before assigning probabilities.
Use complement, addition, and multiplication rules with explicit event relationships.
Interpret conditional probability as a changed reference group.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

# Add one tested model increment per activity.
